name: autoresearch
description: Claude Autoresearch — autonomous goal-directed iteration for Claude Code. Inspired by Karpathy's autoresearch: constraint + mechanical metric + autonomous iteration = compounding gains.

plugins.name: autoresearch
plugins.description: Autonomous improvement engine for Claude Code: /autoresearch runs an unlimited modify-verify-keep/discard loop. Includes /autoresearch:plan (goal wizard), /autoresearch:predict (multi-persona swarm prediction), /autoresearch:security (STRIDE + OWASP audit), /autoresearch:ship (multi-phase delivery workflow), /autoresearch:debug (autonomous bug hunter), /autoresearch:fix (autonomous error crusher), /autoresearch:scenario (edge case explorer), and /autoresearch:learn (autonomous documentation engine).

plugins.name: autoresearch-copilot
plugins.description: Autonomous improvement engine for Copilot CLI: integrates with plan mode and autopilot mode. /autoresearch runs an unlimited modify-verify-keep/discard loop. Includes /autoresearch:plan (goal wizard with plan mode), /autoresearch:predict, /autoresearch:security, /autoresearch:ship, /autoresearch:debug, /autoresearch:fix, /autoresearch:scenario, and /autoresearch:learn.
